description: Implement vector store dimension mismatch detection for RAG system. When switching LLM providers (e.g., OpenAI 1536-dim to Ollama 768-dim), the system fails late with cryptic error during embedding insertion. Need early detection during vector store initialization with clear user guidance.
goal: Add dimension validation to SQLiteVectorStore.initialize() to detect mismatch between expected provider dimension and stored vector dimension, providing clear error message with remediation steps
requirements: Add dimension check in SQLiteVectorStore.initialize() method
Throw clear error: 'Dimension mismatch: Vector store has X dimensions, but provider requires Y'
Include remediation steps in error: 'Run with --reset to recreate, or delete .coderef/rag-vectors.sqlite'
Validate fix with manual test: OpenAI index -> Ollama switch

metrics.functional: Early error detection before file analysis
metrics.ux: Clear error message with actionable remediation
